items.claim: Conor McGregor possesses an exceptionally long reach and a high-level left hand.
items.quote: Conor has a crazy long reach with great left hand. The best left hand.

items.claim: Max Holloway has a highly durable chin.
items.quote: to Max's credit, he's got a [ __ ] chin.

items.claim: Max Holloway is difficult to track down with power strikes due to his movement.
items.quote: It's hard to track Max down with big shots.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is unlikely to succeed against Max Holloway in a striking-based matchup.
items.quote: I don't think Conor has a chance in the striking department.

items.claim: Max Holloway's takedown defense and ability to return to his feet have improved significantly.
items.quote: I think Max Holloway's takedown defense and stand-ups are actually pretty good.

items.claim: Conor McGregor lacks the grappling ability to effectively hold Max Holloway down.
items.quote: Conor can hit a double, but it won't be so easy to hold Max Holloway down anymore
